title: Release v1.0.0 · 4 Mar 2026
description: mobile layout consistency - prevent zoom, close nav on all links, eliminate horizontal scroll
content:
## What's new

- **Fix:** mobile layout consistency - prevent zoom, close nav on all links, eliminate horizontal scroll
- **New:** add product feedback & release notes system
- **Fix:** polyfill DOMMatrix before PDF parse to avoid 'DOMMatrix is not defined'
- **Fix:** use require('pdf-parse') first in production to avoid 't is not a function'
- **Fix:** runtime=nodejs + require('pdf-parse') fallback when NODE_ENV=production
- **Fix:** use require('pdf-parse') so parser is callable in prod (ESM interop)
- **Fix:** pdf-parse first for server-side extraction; expose full error in response
- **Fix:** pdfjs worker resolution - try .min.mjs first, normalise module shape
- **Fix:** set pdfjs GlobalWorkerOptions.workerSrc to resolvable file URL
- **Fix:** Node runtime + DOMMatrix polyfill for PDF parsing
- **Fix:** PDF parsing - use pdfjs-dist only, remove pdf-parse (DOMMatrix)
- **Fix:** use pdfjs-dist first for H&S audit PDF parsing to avoid DOMMatrix error
